label: Siding
documentation: Represents a siding rail in the transit system.

label: getName
documentation: Returns the siding name / siding number.

label: getHexId
documentation: Get the id of the siding, formatted in hexidecimal.

label: getId
documentation: Returns the unique long ID of the siding.

label: getRailLength
documentation: Returns the length of the siding in meters.

label: getDepotName
documentation: Returns the name of the depot containing this siding. Returns empty string if no reference exists.

label: getEarlyVehicleIncreaseDwellTime
documentation: Returns whether vehicle will extend its dwell time if arriving early.

label: getMaxVehicles
documentation: Returns the maximum number of vehicles for this siding. 0 indicates unlimited.

label: getIsUnlimited
documentation: Returns whether the siding allows unlimited vehicles.

label: getDelayedVehicleSpeedIncreasePercentage
documentation: Returns the speed increase percentage for late trains (integer form).

label: getDelayedVehicleReduceDwellTimePercentage
documentation: Returns the dwell time reduction percentage for late trains (integer form).

label: getMidPosition
documentation: Returns the Position in the middle of the siding rail.

label: containsPos
documentation: Whether pos is equal to the start or end of the rail position.

label: Platform
documentation: Represents a platform rail where vehicles stop for passengers.

label: routes
documentation: A list of routes that goes through this platform.

label: routeColors
documentation: All colors of routes that go through this platform.

label: getName
documentation: Returns the platform name / platform number.

label: getHexId
documentation: Get the hexadecimal ID of the platform.

label: getId
documentation: Returns the unique long ID of the platform.

label: getDwellTime
documentation: The dwell time duration of the platform in milliseconds.

label: getMidPosition
documentation: Returns the Position in the middle of the platform rail.

label: containsPos
documentation: Whether pos is equal to the start or end of the rail position.

label: Station
documentation: Represents a Station area containing platforms and exits.

label: getHexId
documentation: Get the hexadecimal ID of the station.

label: getId
documentation: Returns the unique long ID of the station.

label: getName
documentation: Returns the station name.

label: getColor
documentation: Returns the RGB color of the station.

label: getColorHex
documentation: Returns the hexadecimal RGB color of the station.

label: getZone1
documentation: Returns Fare Zone 1 of the station.

label: getZone2
documentation: Returns Fare Zone 2 of the station.

label: getZone3
documentation: Returns Fare Zone 3 of the station.

label: getMinX
documentation: Returns the minimum X position of the station area.

label: getMaxX
documentation: Returns the maximum X position of the station area.

label: inArea
documentation: Whether a Position is inside the station area.

label: isTransportMode
documentation: Whether the given TransportMode matches the station's assigned mode.

label: getCenter
documentation: Returns the Position of the station area's center point.

label: getExits
documentation: Returns a list of station exits.

label: StationExit
documentation: Represents a Station Exit entry.

label: getName
documentation: Returns the name of the exit (e.g., Exit letter).

label: getDestinations
documentation: Returns a list of destinations configured for the exit.

label: TransportMode
documentation: Represents a type of transport (Train, Boat, Cable Car, etc.).

label: TRAIN
documentation: Instance of TransportMode representing rail transport.

label: BOAT
documentation: Instance of TransportMode representing boat transport.

label: CABLE_CAR
documentation: Instance of TransportMode representing cable car transport.

label: AIRPLANE
documentation: Instance of TransportMode representing air transport.

label: maxLength
documentation: Returns the maximum vehicle length allowed for the transport.

label: SimplifiedRoute
documentation: A Route object optimized for client-side consumption.

label: getName
documentation: Returns the route name.

label: getId
documentation: Returns the unique ID of the route.

label: getColor
documentation: Returns the RGB color of the route.

label: getCircularState
documentation: Returns the Circular State of the route.

label: getPlatforms
documentation: Returns a list of stop points (SimplifiedRoutePlatform) for the route.

label: getPlatformIndex
documentation: Returns the index of the first instance of the platform in the route. -1 if not found.

label: SimplifiedRoutePlatform
documentation: Represents a specific stop/platform in a route.

label: getPlatformId
documentation: Returns the ID of the platform.

label: getStationName
documentation: Returns the name of the belonging station area.

label: getDestination
documentation: Returns the destination string of this platform in the route.

label: CircularState
documentation: Represents circular state options for a route.

label: NONE
documentation: The route is not circular.

label: CLOCKWISE
documentation: The route is clockwise circular.

label: ANTICLOCKWISE
documentation: The route is anti-clockwise circular.

label: Vehicle
documentation: Represents a vehicle formation or consist.

label: vehicleExtraData
documentation: Real-time data related to operations (speed, next stop, etc.).

label: VehicleExtraData
documentation: Represents real-time operational data of a vehicle.

label: getSidingId
documentation: Returns the ID of the siding this vehicle belongs to.

label: getStopIndex
documentation: Returns the next stop index along the path.

label: getIsTerminating
documentation: Returns whether the train has reached the last stop or beyond.

label: getSpeedTarget
documentation: Returns the target speed in m/ms.

label: getThisRouteId
documentation: Returns the route ID of the current/upcoming stop.

label: getNextRouteId
documentation: Returns the route ID of the next stop.

label: RouteType
documentation: Represents the category of the route (Normal, Light Rail, High Speed).

label: NORMAL
documentation: Normal Heavy Rail route.

label: PathData
documentation: Represents a single rail section of a generated path.

label: getStartDistance
documentation: Returns the starting distance of the path.

label: getSpeedLimitKilometersPerHour
documentation: Returns the speed limit of this rail in km/h.

label: Rail
documentation: Represents a single rail section (Node to Node).

label: canAccelerate
documentation: Returns whether the train can accelerate on this rail.

label: Vector
documentation: A three-dimensional vector (x, y, z).

label: rotateY
documentation: Rotate the vector in the y-axis by angle. Returns a new rotated Vector.

label: distanceTo
documentation: Returns the distance in meters in comparison to vec.

label: Position
documentation: Represents an integer block position (x, y, z).

label: Position
detail: new Position(x: long, y: long, z: long): Position
documentation: Constructor, create a Position from the specified x y z coordinates.

label: Position
documentation: Constructor, converting a Vector to a Position by rounding down.

label: getX
documentation: Return the x position.

label: offset
detail: Position.offset(offsetX: long, offsetY: long, offsetZ: long): Position
documentation: Returns a copy of the position with the specified offset.

label: getMin
documentation: Returns a new Position with the minimum values of the given two positions.
